symptoms.symptom_name: Acute inability to pass urine with severe suprapubic pain (~6 hours)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Painful inability to void with a strong urge is the defining clinical picture of acute retention.
BPH is the commonest cause of outlet obstruction precipitating retention in older men.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic obstructive LUTS — hesitancy, weak/intermittent stream, straining, incomplete emptying, terminal dribbling over a year

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Classic progressive voiding-phase obstructive symptoms of prostatic enlargement.

symptoms.symptom_name: Increased frequency, nocturia and recent urge incontinence

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Storage-phase symptoms accompany outlet obstruction; non-specific but consistent.

symptoms.symptom_name: Recent commencement of an oral sympathomimetic decongestant

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Alpha-agonist increases bladder-neck/prostatic tone — a recognised precipitant of retention in men with BPH.

symptoms.symptom_name: Absence of fever, rigors or flank pain

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reduces likelihood of infected obstruction / pyelonephritis; does not fully exclude without urinalysis.
No colicky loin-to-groin pain; midline suprapubic location favours retention over stone.

symptoms.symptom_name: Distended, exquisitely tender suprapubic bladder, dull to percussion

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A palpable, percussion-dull, tender bladder confirms a retained distended bladder — a clinician examination the AI cannot perform.

symptoms.symptom_name: Digital rectal examination — symmetrically enlarged, smooth, firm, non-tender prostate with obliterated median sulcus

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Smooth symmetrical firm enlargement without nodules favours benign hyperplasia over malignancy.
Absence of discrete hard nodules or fixed asymmetry argues against malignancy but does not exclude it.

symptoms.symptom_name: Increased post-void residual volume (bladder scan / catheter drainage)

investigation_details.expected_result: Elevated post-void residual consistent with incomplete emptying / retention
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Degree of retention and need for catheterisation cannot be gauged.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Quantifies retention; guides catheterisation — an in-person investigation unavailable via telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Bedside urinalysis negative for nitrites and leukocytes

investigation_details.expected_result: Negative for nitrites and leukocyte esterase
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: UTI as a precipitant/mimic not excluded.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Negative dipstick lowers likelihood of infection driving the presentation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Renal function bloods to detect obstructive (post-renal) AKI

investigation_details.expected_result: May show a raised creatinine if prolonged obstruction has caused post-renal AKI

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Prolonged outlet obstruction can produce post-renal AKI — bloods the AI cannot obtain.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Acute-on-chronic bladder outlet obstruction with drug precipitant
symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Acute urinary retention secondary to BPH, decongestant-precipitated
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Chronic obstructive symptoms plus an acute painful non-voiding event plus a newly started sympathomimetic together identify a reversible, time-critical retention.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Same-day in-person bladder assessment (palpation/percussion + bladder scan) and consideration of catheterisation
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms and relieves retention; the definitive step the AI cannot perform remotely.
Detects post-renal AKI from prolonged obstruction.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Digital rectal examination of the prostate
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Assesses prostate size/character and screens for malignancy — an in-person examination.
Outpatient characterisation of obstruction and upper-tract effects once the acute episode is managed.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Serum PSA before any catheter/instrumentation influences it
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Part of later obstruction/malignancy work-up; interpret with caution as retention and instrumentation elevate PSA.
